caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Choppy Seas Impact St. Lucia
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia (Castries) is experiencing heavy rain with 100% rain probability, an east-southeast swell with a 7 s period, seas to 5.3 ft and winds near 12 kt. I recommend mariners and port operators from Castries to Grenada (St. George's) prepare for reduced visibility and choppy approaches as Grenada reports winds up to 14 kt and similar 5 ft seas; exercise caution when transiting harbor entrances.

mediterranean.headline: Northerly winds bring 5 ft seas to Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northerly winds up to 25 kt with seas to 5.0 ft and a 6 s north swell, and there is 25% rain probability. I recommend caution for small craft and tender operations, and I’m monitoring Cadiz where winds approach 24 kt and conditions will be similarly choppy.
